summary: A small rectangular bunker-like structure with a flat roof, featuring a brick and stone exterior with a white concrete foundation platform. The building has a single dark window opening and is constructed with layered materials including brick walls, stonebrick trim, and a dark wood or obsidian roof cap.
rebuild_hints: Start with concrete foundation platform approximately 1 block thick, extending 1-2 blocks beyond the main structure
Build main walls from brick, approximately 3-4 blocks tall
Add horizontal stonebrick bands at regular intervals (approximately every 2 blocks vertically)
Place single centered window opening on front face, framed with white concrete or stone
Cap roof with dark wood or obsidian blocks, creating a flat top
Ensure symmetry along the length axis
Interior appears hollow/empty based on window view
uncertainties: Precise roof material (dark wood vs obsidian) cannot be definitively determined
Exact block count for dimensions estimated from visual proportions
Whether structure has multiple rooms or single chamber
Exact height of foundation platform (appears to be 1-2 blocks)
